  "title": "Oval Solitaire Diamond Engagement Ring with Pave Band",
  "description": "Classic engagement ring featuring a four-prong oval center stone setting with a delicate pave diamond band.     "Micro-pave diamond band with approximately 20-24 accent stones",
    "Cathedral shoulder design",
    "Comfort fit rounded interior band",
    "Tapered shank from 2mm to 1.8mm"
